@if (lists.cartItems().length === 0) {

Your cart is empty.

Continue shopping
} @else {
@for (item of lists.cartItems(); track item.productId) {
{{ item.name }}

In Stock · {{ item.stock }}

{{ item.price | currency: 'USD' : 'symbol' : '1.0-0' }}

{{ item.quantity }} |
{{ item.price * item.quantity | currency: 'USD' : 'symbol' : '1.0-0' }}
}
}

Subtotal: {{ totalAmount() | currency: 'USD' : 'symbol' : '1.0-0' }}
